message:
test(bd-12l0): cover filesystem provider edge cases and helpers

Add 6 tests for providers/filesystem.rs covering detect_mime_type case
insensitivity, glob_match question-mark boundary, base64_encode round-trip,
empty-root handler, nonexistent-root list_files error, and path traversal
blocking in read_file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
